title: CBN Reports All-Time High Remittance Inflows at US$553 Million for July 2024 - FinancialEDGE
description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has reported a significant increase in remittance inflows, reaching $553 million in July 2024, a 130 per cent increase from the corresponding period in 2023. This figure according to a statement signed by Hakama Sidi Ali (Mrs.) Ag. Director, Corporate Communications of CBN, represents the highest monthly total inflows
html: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has reported a significant increase in remittance inflows, reaching $553 million in July 2024, a 130 per cent increase from the corresponding period in 2023.
